node.statement: MISSING — Sparse-Access Oracle Construction: No framework for building row/column/entry oracles from classical matrix descriptions. Needed for: (1) FEM stiffness/mass matrix block encodings (Lemma 21), (2) diagonal matrix block encodings (Lemma 23), (3) fission matrix block encodings (Lemma 22). The oracles are reversible classical computations involving: region identification (which of z regions contains node i), FEM integral lookup (precomputed classically), and sparse index arithmetic. Need a ReversibleOracle type or pattern.
